doseone.title: 0RBITALIS Soundtrack
doseone.about:
the 0RBITALIS Soundtrack is a sprawling & ambient synthesizer soaked StarWalk. Perfect for wandering and/or wondering, it goes well with drawing, writing, working, coding, longing, sleeping, sex and ALSO playing 0RBITALIS !
WARNING: SPACE IS SILENT; This is a synthetic interpretation of the sounds stars may or may not make while slowly separating .
Product not approved by NASA.
0RBITALIS is a gravity simulator with a retro-puzzle feel, by Alan Zucconi : explore stars, dodge asteroids and destroy planets. As you LAUNCH your satellite into orbit and dance undaunted with the force keeping all this Universe together: Gravity...
www.0rbitalis.com

doseone.title: All Portrait, No Chorus
doseone.label: BackwoodzStudioz
doseone.about:
All Portrait, No Chorus is the new album from indie rap pioneer doseone and NYC producer Steel Tipped Dove, dropping January 10, 2025. Together, these two artists have crafted an uncompromising masterpiece. Knowing the caliber of MC he is paired with, dove skillfully paints with every color on the palette, and doseone skates effortlessly on every track, whether skating languid figure 8s or landing lyrical triple axels. Somehow the veteran sounds sharper than ever and the songs are lean and hungry, cut to the quick.
It is no accident that this project is released under the Backwoodz Studioz imprint; the road that leads to this collaboration starts with, of all things, a ShrapKnel demo. Here is how dose explains it:
“I have been inspired by Backwoodz for a while, in many ways, but the most potent being all these distinct pens. September 2023, I had heard a nearly done version of ShrapKnel’s latest record, and something snapped in me. Hearing that perfectly hungry, inspired rapping turned my power back on. For me, being inspired warrants telling those who are inspiring you, so [once I heard Decay] I reached out and sent Fatboi Sharif and dove some kind words about that record. The rest is history.”
At the end of December 2023 dove sent dose the first beat pack. Somewhere around the second week of January 2024 dose already had five songs written and recorded. By the middle of March, a rough album framework was essentially done, and they brought on Minneapolis producer Andrew Broder to freak the turntables across the whole project. Then, as a final piece, dose and dove added select collaborations from some of their favorite rappers. By the end of April it was done.
“I’m not really a features guy, but to align with and connect with those who inspire me, I called in some beautiful humans I had never worked with but always meant to: Open Mike Eagle, M.Sayyid, billy woods, Fatboi Sharif, and Myka 9 connect eras, artists, and styles of unconventional rap I hold incredibly dear,” doseone explains.
Listening to All Portrait, No Chorus you can hear the battery in doseone’s back as he pythons his way through each instrumental. For his part, steel tipped dove—a prolific producer over the last two years—delivers some of the most diverse work of his career. The result is a dynamic, propulsive listen that casts its crackling energy in every direction except backwards.
doseone.credits:
released January 10, 2025
Raps and Art by doseone
Produced and Mixed by Steel Tipped Dove
All songs feature Andrew Broder on Turn Table
Mastered by Willie Green

doseone.title: DISC ROOM (Original SoundTrack)
doseone.about:
DISC ROOM (Original SoundTrack) is 53 tracks of death bent Sci-Fi synth melodies and blistering bass heavy beats from the indie VideoGame DISC ROOM. Enjoy 2 hours of anthemic adrenaline inducing slappers, packed with break neck drums and sinister SpaceWave melodies. You too, can feel the presence of blood curdling saw blades surrounding you in the privacy of your own home with the DISC ROOM (Original SoundTrack)!
BONUS iOS RingTones & Alerts available on BandCamp ONLY!
For more information on DISC ROOM please visit:
discroom.com
DISC ROOM, are you ready to get sliced in half? The year is 2089 and a giant disc has appeared in orbit of Jupiter. Step into the oversized space suit of a brave scientist and explore this sprawling intergalactic slaughterhouse. And remember, what kills you...only makes you stronger.
doseone.credits:
released October 22, 2020
Produced by doseone
Mastered by Matt Hettich

doseone.title: EXIT THE GUNGEON (Original SoundTrack)
doseone.about:
EXIT THE GUNGEON (Original SoundTrack) is a bright blistering collection of all things EXTRA and EXIT The Gungeon! Enjoy all 23 Sinister yet soothing slappers from the safety of your favorite playback devise. EXIT THE GUNGEON (Original SoundTrack) brings the music from every GUNGEON update together into a singular slice of synergy.
EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEExit the GUNGEON!
Exit the Gungeon is a bullet hell dungeon climber immediately following the adventures of the misfit ‘Gungeoneers’ and their journey for personal absolution in Enter the Gungeon. The Gungeon has become a paradox and is collapsing! Armed with an ever-changing weapon, an insatiable need to loot, and the trusty dodge roll, each of our heroes must ascend and escape via their own unique route of increasingly perilous elevators. Battle against the last and most bitter of the Gundead at a frantic pace, slowing down just long enough to chat with some familiar faces… and a few new ones. Shifting rooms, enemies, bosses, bizarre weapons and items all combine to ensure that no two attempts to Exit the Gungeon are the same.
Also, you can wear hats. Everybody loves hats, and spin-offs, which this game is... of Enter the Gungeon.
Version 2.0 Available Now on Nintendo Switch, PC, and Apple Arcade!
exitthegungeon.com

doseone.title: HIGH HELL SoundTrack
doseone.about:
The HIGH HELL SoundTrack is a brutal bouquet of industrial strength CHIP-TRAP. HIGH HELL's track textures gradually explode into an unpredictable array of bangers, distortion, screams and time signatures. Enjoy the slapping SATANIC sounds that surround you in HIGH HELL at home, on your phone or while going HELL!
HIGH HELL is a neon-soaked, arcade-action first-person shooter from Terri Vellmann (Heavy Bullets) and Doseone (Enter the Gungeon, Gang Beasts). Pop brainwashed chimps, deface corporate effigies, and dismantle the business dealings of PITCHCORP in a vibrant remix of the classic first-person shooter.

doseone.title: North American Adonis
doseone.about:
North American Adonis by Buck 65, doseone & Jel
What began 25 years ago on 8 track in a Cincinnati basement...
Has been realized at last today...
North American Adonis is a Hip Hop Fever Dream, crafted by 3 old friends and fellow 1200 Hobos. The pace and punch of a 90's mixtape meets the wit and wizardry of 3 underground rap stalwarts. Full of humor, heart, breaks and cuts this 15 track album delivers the spirit of the lost 1998 demos coupled with the mastery Buck, dose & Jel have mustered since.
Featuring the OG 1200 HOBO himself Mr.Dibbs...
We proudly present North American Adonis.

handsmade.xyz

doseone.title: SLUDGE LIFE (Original SoundTrack)
doseone.about:
SLUDGE LIFE (Original SoundTrack), is the quirked out kick heavy music from SLUDGE LIFE! Enjoy every single SLAPPER from everyone's favorite potently polluted island. Turn up that BIG MUD and bang your head or extract your chill with SAD BOY II. Let the feels in and keep the working world out with a bubbling 41 track SoundTrack.
Art vandals Terri Vellmann & doseone (HIGH HELL) and talented finger painters Devolver Digital have revealed SLUDGE LIFE, a graffiti romp through a polluted island full of cranky idiots with a vibe so thick you can taste it.
Roam a tiny island stuck on a sludge covered planet as upcoming tagger GHOST, a breezy bandit set on staking their claim amongst the graffiti elite. Traverse the corporately branded landscape, link up with other taggers, and steal junk and hearts along the way. Will you become the king of the island and tag every open inch, infiltrate sludge-pumping corporation GLUG, or just take it all down in flames with you?
www.shopsludgelife.com

doseone.title: SUPER GAME JAM SoundTrack
doseone.about:
SUPER GAME JAM SoundTrack
by doseone & Kozilek
Is the Score to SUPER GAME JAM, a collection of short films, detailing the joys and jumble of Game Jamming.
This music was MADE for YOU to MAKE things to!!!
the SUPER GAME JAM SoundTrack, is a 75 Minute Long Playing explore of Broken Melody, Beautiful BackGrounds, Big Beats and delightful melancholy.
SUPER GAME JAM is a documentary series about making video games in 48 hours. Starring the following Beautiful peoples; Jan Willem Nijman, Richard Boeser, Christoffer Hedborg, Dominik Johann, Sosowski, doseone, Jonatan Soderstrom, Martin Jonasson, Liselore Goedhart, and Tom Francis.
Produced by Bram Ruiter & Daniel Carneiro.
Published by Devolver Digital.
Please Visit:
supergamejam.com
www.Kozilek.com
doseone.credits:
released October 6, 2014
SUPER GAME JAM SoundTrack
Produced by doseone & Kozilek
Is the Score to SUPER GAME JAM, a collection of short films, detailing the joys and jumble of Game Jamming.
This music was MADE for YOU to MAKE things to!!!
the SUPER GAME JAM SoundTrack, is a 75 Minute Long Playing explore of Broken Melody, Beautiful BackGrounds, Big Beats and delightful melancholy.
the SUPER GAME JAM SoundTrack, was JAM'd out by doseone & Kozilek over a 48 Hr Period. Those Jams were then thrown back and forth across the ocean from Oakland to Finland until done. EVERYTHING you hear is heavily inspired by the HumanBeings involved in SUPER GAME JAM, and the perfect pleasure it is to make something from nothing.
LOVE, doseone & Kozilek
SUPER GAME JAM is a documentary series about making video games in 48 hours. Starring the following Beautiful peoples; Jan Willem Nijman, Richard Boeser, Christoffer Hedborg, Dominik Johann, Sosowski, doseone, Jonatan Soderstrom, Martin Jonasson, Liselore Goedhart, and Tom Francis.

doseone.about:
doseone & Height Keech,
have joined forces and conjured this blistering 6 song EP, that captures the frustration and anger a modern American is sewing in its peoples.
Written the week of 6/9/25 and recorded in protest on 6/14/25.
May all kind hearts feel seen in these songs...
May all fascists, bigots and closed minded individuals feel stared at...
